theme: bottle deposits across twelve cantons with haulers
title: Twelve Cantons, One Bottle Market
strategies: uniform deposit: post the same fixed deposit everywhere, always arbitrage-free but forfeits all regional elasticity gains
per-canton standalone elasticity optimum: solve each canton's own return-rate curve in isolation, ignoring the hauler network entirely

graph-Lipschitz projection: compute the shortest-path transport metric over the corridor graph, then take the McShane-Whitney Lipschitz extension of the per-canton targets so no pairwise differential is exploitable

projection plus coordinate ascent: initialize from the Lipschitz-safe vector, then let each canton ride back up to the tight polytope face against its neighbours whenever that raises the total replayed objective
